violations.text: The high temp dish washer was observed at roughly 7 psi. The dishwasher shall be properly adjusted to reach manufacturers specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The floors in the basement area of the facility have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Coated shelving in refrigeration unit(s) were observed to be worn and/or rusty. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution tablets for the concession's locations (observed to have chlorine and pH testing strips). PIC to obtain proper test strips for the sanitizer solution being used. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces of the Warehouse Kitchen popcorn maker and the West Concession's reach-in freezer were observed to have an accumulation of food residue, ice, and/or other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Ice machines and ice wells in the concession's locations were observed to be lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The ceiling and ceiling vents in the Warehouse Kitchen were observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Cheese was observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The dishwasher located in the 2nd Pantry area was not in good repair. Per person in charge, maintenance service request will be placed to repair the unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish washer in the second pantry. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the main kitchen and first pantry. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The floors in the main kitchen and the south pantry area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
